title: Parenting Helplines * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Parenting Helplines * Disabilities Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disabilities Issues Foster Parents Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FACT OREGON PARENT TRAINING AND INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parent trainings, resources, information, and support to parents and caregivers on issues related to special education. FACT Help Line is available to answer questions, provide assistance with special educational concerns, and support families' preparation for IEP meetings. 2475 SE Ladd Avenue Suite 430 Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Families or professionals supporting a child experiencing disability ages 0-26 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (888) 988-3228 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a call-in center for family members of children and youth with special needs and chronic health conditions (developmental and emotional disabilities, behavioral problems, and chronic physical illnesses) and professionals who serve them. The center specializes in providing information and resources related to health information, health care access, and special needs systems and supports. All calls are confidential. Families may also request to be placed on an email list to receive monthly correspondence about issues of importance to children and youth with special needs in Oregon. 707 SW Gaines Street Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Family members of individuals age 26 and younger with special physical, emotional, behavioral, or mental health needs, including those who are at risk or suspected of having a special need. The child/youth does not have to have a diagnosed condition. Does not require documentation to prove citizenship to receive services. Hours: Message line available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 990-9930 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FACT OREGON PARENT TRAINING AND INFORMATION OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER
